executive_summary.finding: EGLD price decoupled from majors: -5.13% WoW vs BTC +1.22% / ETH +0.26%. Last week's +3.29σ rally was confirmed as a one-week event (z-score reverted to +0.77).

NEW PATTERN — Cross-exchange OTC funnel discovered: Binance.com 2 sent 80K+ EGLD via three routing wallets (nonces 147-180) to both UPbit OTC Desk and OTC Distribution Wallet. First observed shared OTC infrastructure on MultiversX.
Yield-chasing migration confirmed: Top 2 staking gainers (Ninja Staking +15.5K, Egld Staking Provider +14.2K) match the 0%-fee, 9%+ APR profile. Top 5 losers all in 6-8% APR range. Net ~30K rotation.
Wealth concentrating upward: Mega whales +78K, large +43K, mid -78K. Combined with flat delegator count (+22), staking growth is whale-driven re-staking, not retail.
Token holders declined for 6th consecutive week across all top-10 by holder count. xExchange 24h volume -21.5% to $74.8K. Established structural trend, not noise.
Staked ratio crossed 49.50% (+0.06pp WoW). 50% milestone now <0.5pp away.
OTC Cycle 2 closing: UPbit OTC Desk and OTC Distribution Wallet each shed ~50K EGLD (-53%). 79K returned to UPbit + 20K Cycle 3 injection started May 1 (overlapping cycles, accelerating cadence).

network_health.analysis: EGLD decoupled from majors this week, falling 5.13% while BTC and ETH posted modest gains. Last week's +3.29σ price spike was a one-week event — z-score reverted to +0.77 (normal). The network grew normally: +3,436 accounts and +1.22M transactions over the period (~174K/day). Staked ratio crossed 49.50% (+0.06pp WoW), now <0.5pp from the 50% milestone. APR continues compressing slowly (8.591% vs 8.606%) as more EGLD locks into delegation. Base/topup spread is narrowing further at 10.60% / 6.20%, suggesting the staking layer is approaching saturation.

wallet_changes.label: OTC Distribution Wallet (coordinated with UPbit OTC Desk)

exchange_flows.signal: mild distribution — UPbit absorbed the entire net inflow; without UPbit, remaining 16 wallets show -27K outflow

entity_netting.interpretation: Net flat — masks 80K+ OTC funnel via routing wallets

whale_intelligence.analysis: This week's whale story is the OTC Cycle 2 endgame and a major new pattern discovery. UPbit OTC Desk and OTC Distribution Wallet both shed ~50K EGLD (-53%); 79K returned to UPbit and the rest distributed externally in 2K and 6K chunks to a small set of recipients. UPbit then re-injected 20K to the OTC Desk on May 1, starting Cycle 3 before Cycle 2 fully closed. The new pattern: Binance.com 2 sent 80K+ EGLD via three established routing wallets (nonces 147–180) to both OTC desks, in identical 5,999/7,999/8,000 EGLD chunks routed within minutes of receipt. This is the first observed *cross-exchange* OTC mechanism on MultiversX — the OTC desks are shared infrastructure, not UPbit-internal. Three previously dormant whales (Mega 985K, A 143K, C 432K) remain stationary — combined 1.56M EGLD ($6.4M) sitting idle as quasi-permanent supply sinks.

apr_outliers.best_delegator_value: Egld Staking Provider 🎖 (9.12% APR, 0% fee — highest yield, no fee deduction)

churn.interpretation: delegators flat (+22) while staked EGLD grew +40K — whale consolidation, not retail. Combined with whale-tier mega+large gain (+121K) and mid loss (-78K), the staking layer is consolidating toward larger holders re-staking via the same delegation pools.

staking_intelligence.analysis: The most informative staking week in 6 runs. The market has finally responded to the asymmetric yield differential we've been flagging. Two 0%-fee, 9%+ APR providers (Ninja Staking +15.5K, Egld Staking Provider +14.2K) gained the equivalent of what 5 lower-APR providers (Figment, Trust Staking, Project X, MrEGLD, $BOBER) lost — a clean rotation signal. Total network stake is essentially flat (+0.28%), so this is migration *within* the staking layer, not new capital. HHI ticked from 0.01889 → 0.01868 (more decentralized). If sustained for 2 more weeks, this is a regime shift in delegator behavior.

token_activity.analysis: Token holder declines now in 6th consecutive week — a confirmed structural trend. All top 10 tokens by holder count lost holders (range: -50 to -200 each). MEX price -11.92% in one week is the steepest decline in 6 runs and underperforms EGLD's -5.13% by 6.79pp — the DEX ecosystem token is weakening faster than the underlying. WEGLD/USDC pair holds 45.7% of all DEX volume in one pair, confirming thin liquidity outside the main stable pair. Total xExchange 24h volume $74.8K — down 60% from the $186K spike 3 weeks ago, now well below the 6-week mean.

protocol_breakdown.notable_events: SEGLD-3ad2d0 ($3.91M) + SWTAO-356a25 ($1.25M). 3.4x larger than XOXNO LSD.
TVL via H-token market caps (HUSDC, HUSDT, HEGLD, HWBTC, HWETH, HHTM, HMEX, HUTK, HWTAO, HBUSD). Excludes HSEGLD/HSWTAO LSD wraps. Underlying deposits grew despite EGLD price decline.
USD TVL declined 3.6% but underlying EGLD balance grew +1.6%. Volume contracted -21.5% to $74.8K.
Highest single-contract throughput on MultiversX. Non-custodial routing — TVL is irrelevant.
JEXchange Lite Pool processed 2,229 transfers in 24h — its first appearance with significant non-zero throughput. Worth tracking.
Stableswap pools effectively dormant. Zero EGLD-side TVL.

defi_activity.analysis: TVL changes are dominated by the EGLD price move (-5.13%). xExchange's 24h volume declined -21.5% in USD terms — this is real activity decline, not just price. Hatom Lending grew +0.93% in USD terms despite the price drop, meaning underlying deposits outpaced the price decline (a healthy signal). The aggregator metric tells the real story: XOXNO Aggregator handled 12,181 transfers in 24h (highest single-contract throughput on the network) and OneDex 8,110 — non-custodial routing volume held up despite the DEX liquidity contraction. JEXchange Lite Pool processed 2,229 transfers in 24h — its first appearance with significant non-zero throughput, may warrant tracking next week.

anomalies.summary: No anomalies above threshold this week. EGLD price reverted from +3.29σ to +0.77σ (within 1σ); DEX volume -0.78σ (within 1σ); staked EGLD +1.05σ (within 1σ). All 3 z-score baselines are now N=6 (statistically meaningful). The most notable structural pattern (token holder decline, 6 weeks running) is now classified as a sustained trend, not an anomaly.

cross_exchange_otc_funnel.description: First observed cross-exchange OTC infrastructure on MultiversX. Binance.com 2 (erd1sdsl) → 3 routing wallets → UPbit OTC Desk + OTC Distribution Wallet.
cross_exchange_otc_funnel.implication: The same OTC infrastructure aggregates flow from at least Binance and UPbit. Prior assumption was UPbit-only OTC. May explain Bybit's +112K EGLD gain last week (downstream of same pipeline).

yield_chasing_migration.description: Stake rotating from low-APR providers to 0%-fee 9%+ APR providers. First clear directional signal after weeks of inertia.
yield_chasing_migration.regime_shift_threshold: If sustained 2+ more weeks, promote from trend to regime shift

consecutive_streaks.interpretation: Established structural decline; airdrop/spam wallet attrition. Active-token base (mcap >$1M) stable.
